40.1.3 - Intermittent Skilled Nursing Care 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

The law, at §1861(m) of the Act defines intermittent, for the purposes of §§1814(a)(2) 
and 1835(a)(2)(A), as skilled nursing care that is either provided or needed on fewer than 
7 days each week, or less than 8 hours each day for periods of 21 days or less (with 
extensions in exceptional circumstances when the need for
